title: ジャパンCの後に・25光年を超えて

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega is in the lead! It's Admire Vega! A
radiance befitting a first-magnitude star streams
through Fuchu!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: ...Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Graaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Kyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Come on, Ayabe. Come on... That's it!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's blocked the return of the Overlord, ending
her turbulent pursuit! Go Admire Vega! Go!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Go for the win! Don't give up! Ayabeeee!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she's first! Shining bright as a star, Admire
Vega is our winner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: ...Thank goodness.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I'm glad Ayabe isn't going to give in to anyone.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: That's how I want her to be when I beat her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: It won't be Opera O. It won't be Doto. It'll be me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I'm going to come out on top!

text_block_list.name: Opera O and Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Ohhhh... I couldn't make it...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Neither could I... You were close behind her, and I
had an early lead. Yet she still snatched the
crown.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
All we can do now is cheer for our first-magnitude
star.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No... for the Centurial Supernova!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! Clap, clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't call me that ever again.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...But thanks for the applause.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...So, you've been here the entire time, haven't
you?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
As I walked along my path, you sent me off at
every starting gate, only to welcome me back
after I crossed the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I pushed you away and no doubt troubled you,
but you stuck with me anyway.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And here you are again... always there for me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.
